message:
feat(tests): add dataset integrity guard + provenance logging

Implement DatasetIntegrityGuard for SHA256 verification before/after copy,
DatasetProvenance for full provenance metadata in summary.json, and
DatasetOverride for custom dataset paths with explicit logging.

Closes beads_rust-b4nj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
